Package index

Download data

download_layers()
Downloads Bio-Oracle layers from the Bio-Oracle ERDDAP server

Discover layers

list_layers()
List the layers in the Bio-Oracle dataset
info_layer()
Gets detailed information about a single Bio-Oracle layer

Background

dataset_id
Unique Identifier of a Bio-Oracle dataset in the ERDDAP Server
ERDDAP
Bio-Oracle ERDDAP Server
biooracler biooracler-package
biooracler: Import Environmental Ocean Data from Bio-Oracle via ERDDAP
